meta.purpose: LLM prompt to generate an Astro static page for Apple Watch repair services

constraints.rendering: Static HTML only — zero client-side JavaScript unless explicitly marked as `client:load` island
constraints.styling: Tailwind CSS using semantic design tokens from the provided CSS variables. NEVER use raw color values (no `bg-blue-500`, no `text-white`). Use `bg-primary`, `text-foreground`, `bg-muted`, etc.
constraints.fonts: Inter via Google Fonts, loaded in <head> with `font-display: swap`
constraints.icons: Inline SVG only — no icon library runtime. Copy SVG paths from Lucide (https://lucide.dev). Each icon must have `aria-hidden="true"` and `focusable="false"`.
constraints.images: All `` tags MUST have `alt`, `width`, `height`, and `loading="lazy"` (except hero which uses `loading="eager"`). Use Astro `` component where possible.
constraints.links_internal: Standard `<a href="/path">` — NO client-side router. All internal links must start with `/`.
constraints.links_external: All external `<a>` tags MUST have `target="_blank"` and `rel="noopener noreferrer"`.
constraints.accessibility: All interactive elements must be keyboard-accessible. Use semantic HTML (`<nav>`, `<main>`, `<section>`, `<article>`, `<footer>`). Buttons must have visible focus rings.
constraints.accordions: Use native `<details>` + `<summary>` elements. NO JavaScript accordions.
forbidden: useState, useEffect, or any React hooks
Any content not present in this JSON

page.metaTitle: Apple Watch Repair Winnipeg | Screen & Battery Replacement
page.metaDescription: Expert Apple Watch repair in Winnipeg. Screen replacement and battery replacement for all Apple Watch models including Series 10, Ultra 2, and SE. Fast, reliable service.
page.h1: Apple Watch Repair in Winnipeg, MB
page.heroDescription: Cracked screen? Battery draining fast? We repair all Apple Watch models in Winnipeg—from Series 3 to the latest Series 10, SE generations, and Ultra.

heroImage.alt: Apple Watch repair services in Winnipeg

services.name: Screen Replacement
services.description: Cracked or unresponsive Apple Watch display? We replace OLED and LTPO screens on all models.

services.name: Battery Replacement
services.description: Apple Watch not lasting all day? Same-day battery replacement.

advantage_pillars.title: Same-Day Watch Repairs
advantage_pillars.description: Most Apple Watch screen and battery repairs completed in 1-2 hours.

advantage_pillars.title: All Sizes Serviced
advantage_pillars.description: We repair all sizes: 38mm, 40mm, 41mm, 42mm, 44mm, 45mm, and 49mm Ultra.

advantage_pillars.title: Warranty on Every Repair
advantage_pillars.description: Screen repair warranties vary by part tier (30 days to lifetime). 90-day battery warranty.

models_description: We repair all Apple Watch models from the original Series 3 to the latest Series 10, SE generations, and Ultra models.

pricing_micro_copy.costDriver: Apple Watch repair costs depend on the model. Apple's battery health documentation explains how to check maximum capacity.
pricing_micro_copy.priceShock: Many customers are surprised that an Apple Watch screen can cost nearly as much as a new SE model. iFixit's Apple Watch teardowns reveal the precision-intensive process.
pricing_micro_copy.advisory: If the repair cost approaches the value of your Apple Watch, we'll explain your options.
pricing_micro_copy.fallback: Unlike phones, Apple Watch data is typically synced to your iPhone, so data loss is rarely a concern.

faqs.question: How long does Apple Watch screen replacement take in Winnipeg?
faqs.answer: Most Apple Watch screen replacements take 1-2 hours.

faqs.question: Is my Apple Watch still water resistant after repair?
faqs.answer: We take care to maintain water resistance during repairs.

faqs.question: How much does Apple Watch battery replacement cost in Winnipeg?
faqs.answer: Costs vary by model. Contact our Winnipeg locations for a free quote.

faqs.question: Do you repair Apple Watch Ultra in Winnipeg?
faqs.answer: Yes! We repair Apple Watch Ultra and Ultra 2.

faqs.question: How do I know if my Apple Watch battery needs replacing?
faqs.answer: Signs include rapid battery drain, unexpected shutdowns, or not lasting a full day.

service_area_note: Serving St. Vital, Fort Garry, Garden City, Transcona, and all Winnipeg neighborhoods. Also serving Thompson, MB. Walk-ins welcome or book online.

locations.name: St. Vital Centre
locations.address: 1225 St Mary's Rd, Winnipeg, MB R2M 5E5

cta.smsMessage: Hi, I found your site searching for Apple Watch repair. Can you help?

validation_checklist: Page has exactly ONE <h1> tag matching the `page.h1` field
All services render with inline SVG icons, not an icon library import
All FAQ items use <details>/<summary>, not JS accordions
All external links have target='_blank' rel='noopener noreferrer'
All three JSON-LD blocks are injected in <head>
No React, Preact, or JSX runtime in the build output
Hero image has loading='eager'; all other images have loading='lazy'
Page renders fully without JavaScript enabled
All color classes use Tailwind semantic tokens (bg-primary, text-foreground, etc.)
Phone links use tel: protocol; SMS links use sms: protocol
Section IDs match table_of_contents entries for anchor navigation
No placeholder content — every string comes from this JSON
